title: lemuel.payment.captured
description: order-service(OutboxBackedEventPublisher) → settlement-service(PaymentEventKafkaConsumer). 정산 생성 + settlement_payment_view 프로젝션 적재. 금액은 BigDecimal.toPlainString() 문자열(정밀도 보존). sellerId/sellerTier/settlementCycle 은 Event-Carried State Transfer(ADR 0020 Phase 1) — 셀러 미할당 시 생략.
